sample_fixtures.sample_grain: Singapore Turf Club legacy racecourse inventory evidence only

expected_fields.racecourse: legacy inventory racecourse name or inactive-country racecourse evidence
expected_fields.meeting_date: legacy racing status date range, not an active meeting date
expected_fields.first_race_time: not generated for Singapore legacy inventory

sample_fixtures.annual_vs_rolling_rule: Legacy-only group: active racing ended in Singapore, so no annual, rolling, first-race, or per-race timetable target is generated.
sample_fixtures.notes: Singapore Turf Club held its final race meeting in 2024; PR-091 preserves legacy inventory evidence only and intentionally creates no active timetable sample target.
